name: Culture Amp Employee Experience API
what_it_does: Culture Amp REST API for employee experience platform covering engagement surveys, performance reviews, goal tracking, and people analytics. Enables AI agents to query engagement data, retrieve survey results, access performance review cycles, and integrate people analytics into HR workflows. Culture Amp is a leading platform for employee engagement measurement.
use_cases: Querying employee engagement survey results and trend data from HR analytics agents
Retrieving performance review completion and feedback data from HRBP workflow agents
Accessing goal tracking and OKR progress from people analytics agents
Integrating engagement signals with turnover risk models from retention agents
not_for: Payroll or benefits management (Culture Amp is engagement/performance focused)
best_when: An HR team using Culture Amp wants AI agents to analyze engagement trends, surface at-risk teams, and integrate people analytics into HRBP and leadership reporting workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee survey and performance data is extremely sensitive. Individual-level data should never be exposed without consent. Culture Amp enforces anonymity thresholds — respect them.

auth.notes: Culture Amp OAuth 2.0. Developer portal for app registration. Scopes control access to survey, performance, and goal data.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per employee annual pricing; Engage, Perform, and Develop modules
pricing.notes: Enterprise HR platform with per-employee pricing. API access included with subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee survey data is highly sensitive — Culture Amp enforces anonymity thresholds
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
Anonymity thresholds mean low-response groups return no data — design agents accordingly
Individual performance review data is extremely sensitive — restrict agent scope carefully
Culture Amp API covers Engage, Perform, and Develop separately — verify licensed modules
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Employee engagement survey data and performance reviews are highly sensitive. Individual data protected by anonymity thresholds. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. AU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: PRIVACY: Employee survey and performance data. Anonymity thresholds protect individuals. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EU and AU data residency.
